{# Navbar navigation links. On toctree-rooted pages, generate_header_nav_html produces the links. On orphan pages (e.g. viewcode _modules/), it returns empty — fall back to a hardcoded list so navigation is always visible. #}
    {% set nav_html = generate_header_nav_html( n_links_before_dropdown=theme_header_links_before_dropdown, dropdown_text=theme_header_dropdown_text ) %} {{ nav_html }} {% if not nav_html.strip() %}

    • {% endif %}
